Due Upon Signing Reservation Agreement ★ $0.00
Green fees and cart/tournament services fees are due 35 days prior to event.
★ Payment Note: Booking Fees and Green Fees are payable to the City of San Diego. Cart/Tournament Services Fees are payable to Torrey Pines Club Corporation (TPCC).
📋 Booking Notes
  • Booking Fee: A non-refundable booking fee and signed tee times reservation agreement are required within 10 days of receipt.
  • Minimum Guarantees: Booked 24+ months in advance — 144 players minimum • Up to 1 year — 70 players minimum • Up to 4 months — 16 players minimum.
  • Full Field Shotgun: 144-player minimum regardless of booking timeline. Start times range from 7:00 AM to 9:00 AM or 1:00 PM to 2:00 PM, depending on the season. A 5-hour time limit applies.
